description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the following variables: baseurl set to "/spindp14", description set to "Dit team gaat de wedstrijd winnen!", highlighter set to false, include set to ["assets"], markdown set to "kramdown", timezone set to "Europe/Amsterdam", title set to "SpInDP 14", and url set to "http://yourdomain.com". No stages, jobs, caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are specified.
